diagrams.title: Transaction State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the lifecycle of a database transaction from start to completion or failure
diagrams.purpose: Understanding transaction states and their transitions for proper transaction management

diagrams.title: ACID Properties Overview
diagrams.description: Four pillars representing the desirable properties of transactions with examples
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the four fundamental properties that ensure reliable database transactions

diagrams.title: Serial vs Concurrent Execution
diagrams.description: Comparison showing serial schedule (T1 completes then T2) vs concurrent schedule (T1 and T2 overlap)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why concurrency control is needed and what makes concurrent execution correct
